title: angraecoides moandensis
intro: Angraecoides moandensis, commonly known as Angraecum moandensis, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. It is a terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, characterized by its distinctive flowers and unique growth habit. The health benefits of Angraecum moandensis are mainly related to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms associated with certain diseases.
